name: Exotic Fruit Salad (Mf)
recipeIngredient: 2 ripe mangoes, papayas or pineapple, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch dice
4 kiwis, peeled and cut into thin rounds (up to 6)
2 bananas, peeled and cut into thin rounds
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, whisk together the confectioner's sugar, lemon juice, vanilla extract, and Chinese five-spice powder until well combined. Adjust the seasoning by adding more or less of each ingredient to taste.
2. Add the mangoes and raspberries to the mixture and toss everything together.
3. Before serving, arrange kiwis in a circular pattern on the outer edge of each of four dessert plates.
4. Place banana slices inside the circle of kiwis, overlapping them slightly while leaving space in the center of the plate.
5. Spoon the macerated raspberries and mangoes into the center of the plate.
6. Dust with additional confectioner's sugar and garnish with mint leaves.
Yield: 4 servings
